name: Tomonoshin Shibui
description: Debut: Episode 1 "Tempestuous Temperaments"  The magistrate's spoiled-rotten son, first seen in the teashop. His bleached hair is distinctive, and anachronistic.    ~!Fuu nearly gets killed for spilling tea on him. He gets his fingers and flunkies broken by Mugen, and then dies in the fire caused by Ryujiro. !~ (Source: Neko-san's Guide to the Characters of Samurai Champloo)
